changes.before: "Safe roads to you. Keep the grain above damp."
Jaina heard the phrase catch too. Keep the grain above damp. Too specific for a casual farewell, and familiar only by retelling...
changes.after: Jaina heard the phrase catch too. Safe roads. What's left of them. Not close this time but exact...

changes.before: "The phrase belongs to the grain trade." Sylvanas kept her hands light on the reins. "Common enough..."
changes.after: "Could still be road talk," Sylvanas said. "But I heard it once on the north road and once here, from grain men both times. I stopped treating it as nothing."

changes.before: She laid one hand on her gelding's neck...
changes.after: She laid one hand on her mare's neck...

changes.before: turning her gelding toward the pale south road...
changes.after: turning her mare toward the pale south road...

changes.before: Arthas would not turn for a threat he could not yet strike...
changes.after: She believed Arthas would not turn for a threat he could not yet strike...
